content: Maker, verified .clinerules diff: only the status header and Ratification section changed, all 5 Articles untouched -- no content drift introduced under cover of ratification.
Maker, verified fe7be6ff's own trail files (00-deps.json through disposition.json) are unmodified -- Article 3 immutability holds. Approval is recorded in this new trail only.

Maker, confirmed this cycle's writes are limited to root .clinerules and .pmcro/trails/ceo/a67f85ba-.../ -- no catalog/, skills.json, marketplace.json, or other-domain SKILL.md touched. hil-gating.md's TYPE1 list not triggered by the write itself; git commit/push remains a separate HIL checkpoint outside this trail's self-seal authority.

Domain-boundary check per approve-initiative.md's own instruction: orchestrator-role and trail-schema (already live from fe7be6ff, unchanged by this cycle) are Platform-layer, not domain-owned -- no Owns/Does-Not-Own violation found.
